prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan VR30DETT (3.0L twin-turbo V6, 400hp stock) with a Tomei 272° duration camshaft kit, HKS GT-SS turbochargers (ball-bearing, 0.82 A/R turbine housing), and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Fujitsubo Legalis R with 70mm dual outlets, paired with a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 1.4 bar peak pressure

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Nismo OS Giken 2-way limited-slip differential, Tomei 4.111 final gear ratio, and a custom driveshaft by Driveshaft Shop (3.5-inch chromoly) to handle 600+ lb-ft torque targets

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for the Y32 chassis), Nismo 5-link rear subframe reinforcement bushings, and a Cusco front strut tower bar (22mm hollow section) to eliminate flex under hard cornering
estetica: Vertex Japan 'Edition K' widebody kit (FRP construction) with integrated carbon fiber canards and a custom 3D-printed rear diffuser by AutoExe, designed specifically for the Ultima's rear overhang

Full custom livery by Rocket Bunny (inspired by the 1990 Nissan R32 Group A race car) with matte gunmetal base, gloss black accents, and hand-painted 'Leopard Ultima' kanji script on the rear quarter panels, executed by Japanese artist 'Shiro'

Interior retrofit with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved), a Nismo S-Tune steering wheel (380mm diameter, suede-wrapped), and a full carbon fiber dash overlay by Seibon, including a custom gauge pod for a Defi Advance BF series boost gauge and oil pressure monitor
